results.title: MULTI-CHANNEL SYSTEMS FOR PROVIDING TUNABLE LIGHT WITH HIGH COLOR RENDERING AND BIOLOGICAL EFFECTS
results.abstract: The present disclosure provides systems for generating tunable white light. results.abstract: The utility model discloses a continuous flow type three-dimension electrode for water body sterilization and a photoactivating combination reaction device. results.title: High-precision remote intelligent control equipment for microbial strain production workshop
results.abstract: The invention discloses high-precision remote intelligent control equipment for a microbial strain production workshop. results.title: A photovoltaic production of wastewater separated by salt water Device
results.abstract: This practical new form of disclosure of a saline separator for the production of waste water from photovoltaic panels covers the area of wastewater treatment technology. This practical new type includes the saline separators, which have mobile poles on the right side of the upper wall of the saline

results.title: A support device for crop cultivation
results.abstract: The invention revealed a support device for crop cultivation, which belongs to the technical field of crop cultivation. The crop is grown with a support unit, with a support unit and a support frame below the support unit; the support unit consists of a connector pole and several ribs that are lined

results.title: Electrically Actuatable Sanitary Fitting
results.abstract: The flow of water through a sanitary fitting is controlled by a hydraulic control unit through which a cold water stream and hot water stream flow, said control unit emitting a mixed water stream. The hydraulic control unit is controlled in turn by a control unit cooperating with a presence sensor.

results.title: Self-powered, self-propelled compute grid with loop topology
results.abstract: An energy-harvesting computing grid includes computing assemblies that cooperate with mobile floating energy harvesters configured to be deployed on a body of water.
